title: erysimum incanum subsp. incanum
intro: Erysimum incanum subsp. incanum, also known as White Wallflower, is a plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, which include reducing fever, soothing respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. Erysimum incanum subsp. incanum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile remedy in traditional medicine.
